response.step_by_step_log:
I identified two songs performed by Natsuiro Matsuri. 
Song 1: "Sekaiichi Kawaii Watashi". I searched for "Sekaiichi Kawaii Watashi Fujita Kotone Japanese and English lyrics".
Song 2: "Geneki Idol Chu~". I searched for "Geneki Idol Chu~ =LOVE Japanese and English lyrics".
Both songs were found successfully. The scene mapping includes the transitions between these songs.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual 3D concert performance by the VTuber Natsuiro Matsuri. It includes performances of two songs: 'Sekaiichi Kawaii Watashi' (originally by Fujita Kotone) and 'Geneki Idol Chu~' (originally by =LOVE).

scenes.description: Natsuiro Matsuri performs 'Sekaiichi Kawaii Watashi' on stage. Song title and performer are implied by the event context.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The cutest person in the world? The cutest person in the universe?
Let me hear more, the reward is...
Close your eyes... kiss...
It's not allowed to look away! OK?
I'm the cutest person in the world!
I'm the cutest person in the universe!
Let me hear more, if you're obedient
